meaning: n.叩击,轻拍,轻敲,斥责vt.敲,拍,打,厉声说出,斥责,使着迷vi.敲击,交谈 [军] Rocket Assisted Projectile,火箭助推炮弹
examples: They rap about life in the inner city.
Her favourite music was by Run DMC, a rap group.
Wolves get a bad rap , says a woman who owns three.
Youth participate in peer-mentorship activities and are encouraged to write and rap about their feelings.
